with:
  # Build the final sentence with proper punctuation handling
      parts = [main_subject]
  
      # Collect all sentence components without double commas
      sentence_components = []
  
      if location_phrase:
          sentence_components.append(location_phrase)
  
      if attributes:
          sentence_components.append(", ".join(attributes))
  
      if related_phrases:
          sentence_components.append(", " + ", ".join(related_phrases))
  
      # Join all components with proper spacing
      if sentence_components:
          sentence = main_subject + ", ".join(sentence_components) + "."
      else:
          sentence = main_subject + "."
  
      # Clean up any double commas that might have been created
      while ", ," in sentence:
          sentence = sentence.replace(", ,", ",")
  
      return sentence
